tasks.subject: Task 1: Add is_null_struct helper to is_null.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a Numba-compiled helper that checks both struct-level and field-level bitmaps in one call.

**Files:**
- Modify: `numbarrow/core/is_null.py`
- Test: `test/test_offset.py` (new `TestIsNullStruct`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `is_null_struct` is @njit-compiled and callable from other @njit functions
- [ ] Handles None for either or both bitmaps
- [ ] Returns correct result for all 4 combinations (both valid, struct null, field null, both null)
- [ ] Awkward Array credit comment present

**Verify:** `source venv/bin/activate && find . -path ./venv -prune -o -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/numba; pytest test/test_offset.py::TestIsNullStruct -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["numbarrow/core/is_null.py", "test/test_offset.py"], "verifyCommand": "source venv/bin/activate && find . -path ./venv -prune -o -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/numba; pytest test/test_offset.py::TestIsNullStruct -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["is_null_struct is @njit-compiled", "handles None bitmaps", "correct for all 4 combinations", "Awkward Array credit"], "model": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Return struct-level bitmap from structured_array_adapter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract the struct-level validity bitmap and return it as the first element of a 3-tuple.

**Files:**
- Modify: `numbarrow/utils/arrow_array_utils.py:75-95`
- Modify: `numbarrow/core/adapters.py:103-105` (no change needed, passes through)
- Test: `test/test_arrow_array_utils.py:17-31`
- Test: `test/test_offset.py:128-161`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `structured_array_adapter` returns `(struct_bitmap, field_bitmaps, field_datas)`
- [ ] struct_bitmap is None when no struct nulls
- [ ] struct_bitmap is uint8 packed bitmap when struct has null rows
- [ ] All existing struct tests updated and passing
- [ ] Awkward Array credit comment present

**Verify:** `source venv/bin/activate && find . -path ./venv -prune -o -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/numba; pytest test/test_arrow_array_utils.py::test_structured_array_adapter test/test_offset.py::TestStructOffset -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["numbarrow/utils/arrow_array_utils.py", "numbarrow/core/adapters.py", "test/test_arrow_array_utils.py", "test/test_offset.py"], "verifyCommand": "source venv/bin/activate && find . -path ./venv -prune -o -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/numba; pytest test/test_arrow_array_utils.py::test_structured_array_adapter test/test_offset.py::TestStructOffset -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3-tuple return signature", "None when no struct nulls", "packed bitmap when struct nulls", "existing tests pass", "Awkward Array credit"], "model": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add struct null row tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add tests for Goykhman's example (null struct rows with offset) and combined struct+field nulls.

**Files:**
- Modify: `test/test_offset.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] test_struct_null_rows_sliced verifies struct bitmap for null rows with offset
- [ ] test_struct_both_null_layers_sliced verifies both bitmap layers with offset
- [ ] is_null_struct used in combined test
- [ ] Full test suite passes

**Verify:** `source venv/bin/activate && find . -path ./venv -prune -o -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/numba; pytest -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["test/test_offset.py"], "verifyCommand": "source venv/bin/activate && find . -path ./venv -prune -o -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/numba; pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test_struct_null_rows_sliced passes", "test_struct_both_null_layers_sliced passes", "is_null_struct used in combined test", "full suite passes"], "model": "sonnet"}
```
